qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: A relational database contains two tables student and department in which student table has columns roll_no, name and dept_id and department table has columns dept_id and dept_name. The following insert statements were executed successfully to populate the empty tables: Insert into department values

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: A table T1 in a relational database has the following rows and columns: The following sequence of SQL statements was successfully executed on table T1. Update T1 set marks = marks + 5 Select avg(marks) from T1 What is the output of the select statement? A. B. C. D.
